title: calycera sessiliflora var. axillaris
intro: Calycera sessiliflora var. axillaris, also known as the Mediterranean Calycera, is a plant species that belongs to the Calyceraceae family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. It has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and pain, as well as possessing immunomodulatory and anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
